claims.claim: Sovaldi/Harvoniによる「C型肝炎の機能的治癒」という前例のない治療効果（SVR率95%以上）が、ペイヤーへの交渉力と患者・医師の強い採用意欲をもたらしている
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Q&A（CCO発言）: 'we have to stand back and look at our products and then recognize that there's an incredible amount of value and incredible amount of innovation... it's that innovation that is our negotiation strength... all payers would like, fundamentally, to make highly innovative medicines that work incredibly well available to their patients.' / 'real world data matches or even is better than our clinical data in some cases.'

claims.claim: 米国商業保険の96%のカバード・ライフとの契約締結により、Harvoniは83%のアクセス（排他的またはパリティ）を確保しており、広範な処方可能性が市場浸透を支えている
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Q&A（CCO発言）: 'if we look at all the lives in U.S., about 96% of lives now are -- that are covered have been agreed and Harvoni has access to 83%, either as an exclusive or a parity access.'

evidence_sources.speaker: Paul Carter
evidence_sources.quote: Q2 2015 Q&A（CCO発言）: 'if we look at all the lives in U.S., about 96% of lives now are -- that are covered have been agreed and Harvoni has access to 83%, either as an exclusive or a parity access.'

claims.claim: HCV治療薬のウェーブ3・4パイプライン（次世代製品）への継続投資により、既存の「Harvoni→次世代」への移行先を内部で確保し、競合（AbbVie等）による既存製品の侵食を先んじてヘッジする研究開発能力を持っている
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Prepared Remarks（発言）: 'wave 3 and wave 4 products' への言及 / Q&A（CEO発言）: 'I have to say that has been accompanied by some really significant increases in innovation and some very interesting and innovative products that have come along... the innovation revolution that we're seeing has driven greater value creation.'

claims.claim: TAF（テノホビル・アラフェナミド）の優れた安全性プロファイル（TDF比）が、長期HIV治療患者の骨・腎臓への副作用を低減し、医師・患者双方に強い切替動機を提供している
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Prepared Remarks（発言）: 'Our newest antiviral agent, TAF... has a superior safety profile compared to TDF. This is important because most newly diagnosed patients will now be treated for decades and, at the same time, many HIV-infected individuals who are in treatment, particularly in the U.S. and Europe, are advancing in age.'

claims.claim: GileadのHIV治療シングルタブレットレジメン（STR）のバックボーンとしての地位が、新HCV薬や将来の抗ウイルス薬のコンビネーション療法への組み込みを通じて「治療の基幹」としてのポジションを維持している
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Prepared Remarks（CCO発言）: 'increased sales of our newer HIV single-tablet regimens.' / Norbert（科学担当）Q&A: 'Sovaldi still has a lot of value in subpopulation and in use with other agents like Daclatasvir, sofosbuvir' 等の記述からコンビネーション治療の基幹としてのポジションが確認できる。

claims.claim: Harvoniの高い治癒率を示す実臨床データ（Real World Evidence）の蓄積が、ペイヤーの処方制限緩和につながり、治療対象患者数の拡大を促進する正のフィードバックループを形成している
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Q&A（CCO発言）: 'we are seeing numerous studies now being published and presented which demonstrate that real world data matches or even is better than our clinical data in some cases. So I think this gives payers a level of confidence that an expensive investment is worth making. And I think that will start to play out.'
